page.title: Venue Accounts
page.subtitle: Exchange cash balances and open positions, labeled by how the venue reported them.

empty.title: No venue accounts
empty.message: Venue balances and positions appear here once an account has been observed for a connected wallet.

banner.title: Some account data is not live truth
banner.message: Rows not marked Live show last-known, simulated, or unavailable data — never authoritative live venue balances.

unavailable.title: Account truth unavailable
unavailable.message: Venue account state could not be loaded. This is not an empty account — the data is simply unavailable right now.

statusTooltip.observed: Live venue truth, observed within the authority window.
statusTooltip.simulated: Paper-trading figures — not real venue balances.
statusTooltip.stale: Last-known snapshot; the authority window elapsed or polling stalled.
statusTooltip.clockError: Observation timestamp is inconsistent with the server clock.
statusTooltip.corrupt: The stored snapshot failed validation and cannot be shown as truth.
statusTooltip.unsupported: This venue does not report account state.
statusTooltip.notApplicable: This component does not apply to the venue.
statusTooltip.unknown: Status could not be classified; treated as not authoritative.

statusTooltip.driftDetected: Method: {{method}}. Authoritative reconciliation evidence found a mismatch.
statusTooltip.openDrift: Method: {{method}}. An open drift episode remains after {{count}} consecutive full mismatches.
statusTooltip.unclassified: Method: {{method}}. Operator classification is required before reconciliation can run.
statusTooltip.notReconciled: Method: {{method}}. Reconciliation evidence is not complete yet.
statusTooltip.stale: Method: {{method}}. The reconciliation verdict is too old to trust.
statusTooltip.clockError: Method: {{method}}. Reconciliation timestamps conflict with the server clock.
statusTooltip.reconciliationError: Method: {{method}}. Reconciliation could not produce a trustworthy verdict.
statusTooltip.unsupported: Method: {{method}}. Reconciliation is not supported for this account.
statusTooltip.unverified: Method: {{method}}. This verdict is not authoritative and is not trusted as reconciled.
